title: DMR: More Dragons: Natural Spawn
description: Makes Dragon Mounts Remastered: More Dragons breeds spawns "naturally"
body:
# Adds support for [DMR: More Dragons](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dragon-mounts-remastered-more-dragons) ## [Original Datapack/Mod Required](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dmr-natural-spawn)
Spoiler
Dimension/Environment Dragon Type Replaces Mobs
Overworld - Taiga Biomes Jack o'Lantern Chicken, Cow
Overworld - Cold Biomes Rudolph Polar Bear, Goat
Overworld - Cherry Grove Cherry Pig, Sheep
Overworld - Underground Sculkier Axolotl, Bat
Nether Soul Sand, Warped Piglin, Zombified Piglin, Enderman, Skeleton, Ghast
End Specter Shulker
* 0.5% chance of replacement for all breeds * Overworld Dragons only spawns at night * Player bred animals don't count * 25% chance for a baby to spawn with the parent **Only supports Dragons from DMR: More Dragons. If you have any question, please join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/atukJ6qJaQ) and we can discuss it.**
